name: Xcode Project MCP Server
what_it_does: Xcode Project MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Xcode projects and workspaces — reading and modifying .xcodeproj files, managing build targets and schemes, adding and removing files from project structure, updating build settings, and integrating Xcode project management into agent-driven iOS/macOS development and build automation workflows.
use_cases: Modifying Xcode project structure from iOS development automation agents
Adding source files to build targets from scaffolding agents
Reading project settings and build configurations from analysis agents
Automating Xcode project updates from CI/CD pipeline agents
Managing Xcode schemes and targets from project organization agents
Generating Xcode project modifications from AI code generation agents
not_for: Non-Apple development (Xcode is macOS-only for iOS/macOS development)
Xcode build execution (this manages project files, not xcodebuild)
Teams not using Xcode as their IDE
best_when: An iOS/macOS developer needs AI-assisted Xcode project management — adding files to targets, updating build settings, or automating project structure modifications.
avoid_when: You develop for Android, Web, or other non-Apple platforms.

auth.notes: No authentication — operates on local .xcodeproj files via filesystem. macOS only. xcodeproj Ruby gem or Swift library used for project file manipulation.

pricing.notes: Free open source MCP. Xcode is free from Apple (requires macOS). Community MCP from cameroncooke.

performance.rate_limits: Local file operations — no external rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: macOS only — Xcode projects are Apple platform-specific
.xcodeproj file modifications can corrupt project if done incorrectly — always back up
Xcode project format can be complex — GUID-based file references
Project file changes may conflict with Xcode's own modifications — close Xcode before automated edits
Community MCP from cameroncooke — experienced Apple developer contributor
Xcode version compatibility — project format may differ between Xcode versions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local file operations. No credentials. macOS only. Backup .xcodeproj before automated modifications. Community MCP. Project file changes are immediately applied.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local files. No credentials. macOS only. Backup before edits. Community MCP. File permissions enforce access.
